🌾 Farming Here Since 1964
Our Story

A Farm, A Field, A Home Away From Home

Crossgate has been a working farm since 1964 and has grown into one of the region's most loved campsites. With a peacock strutting round the yard, piglets in the barn, goats on the climbing frame, and The Cow Shed bar just steps away — there's nowhere quite like it.

☕

The Cow Shed Café & Bar

Our famous barn bar is open every weekend — wood-fired pizzas, cold drinks, and great vibes with views to match.

🔥

Firepits Welcome

Every pitch has space to light up — campfire nights are the best nights.

🚿

Showers & Toilets On Site

Coin-operated hot showers — £1 for 10 minutes. Clean facilities maintained to a high standard every day.

🐄

Real Farm Experience

You're on a working farm — meet the animals, explore the fields, and soak it all in.

Ages 12–16: £10 online / £8 cash  ·  Under 12s: FREE 🎉

Our open grass field — pitch your tent or park your campervan wherever you like. Plenty of space, no rows, no fuss. Campervans and motorhomes welcome. No caravans. No motorbikes.

🧒 Under 12s FREE  |  🧒 Ages 12–16: £8/night

Why Book Direct?

💰

Best Price Guaranteed

No commission fees. The price you pay goes straight to the farm — not a third-party platform.

📞

Talk to a Real Person

Questions about your stay? Call or email us directly. We know our site better than any website.

🔄

Flexible Cancellations

Life happens. We'll always try to work with you if plans change.

✉️

Instant Confirmation

Get your booking confirmation by email within a few hours of requesting.

🎉 £12.50 cash on arrival or £15 online per adult per night. Ages 12–16: £8 cash / £10 online. Under 12s FREE. No caravans, no motorbikes.
Find Us

Getting to Crossgate

We're nestled in the beautiful Peak District village of Tintwistle, right on the edge of the Longdendale Valley. Easy to reach from Manchester, Sheffield, and across the North West.

🚗
By Car: Sat nav postcode: SK13 1HP, Tintwistle. We're just off the A628 Woodhead Road — look for the farm gate.
🚌
By Bus: The 236 bus runs through Tintwistle village — a short walk from the stop to the site.
🚉
By Train: Hadfield station is about 2 miles away. Taxis are readily available from there.
📞
Lost? Call us and we'll guide you in — 07833 45066.
📍
